description: CompositionWhite shirt made of 100% cotton, has long sleeves with buttoned cuffs, collar with panel detailing on the inseam, buttoned placket on the front, dark grey stitch detailing, patch pockets with buttoned flaps on the chest, brand seal appliqued on the left sleeve, branding near the right side seam and a curved hemlineFittingRegularWash careMachine wash warm using a mild detergentWash dark colours separatelyDo not bleach, wring or dry clean Tumble dry or flat dry in shadeMild ironDo not iron on print/embellishment/embroideryGet ready for a cool, rugged look in this white shirt from lee. The stitch detailing and brand seal on the left sleeve adds an element of interest, while the cotton fabric keeps you fresh and comfortable all day. Team this with jeans or chinos and lifestyle footwear from the wide collection available at myntra for casual occasions.Model statisticsThe model wears size M in shirtsHeight-6.3”, Shoulders-19"
